pi_items.source: Task specification and user-provided requirement. Consistent with iDempiere naming conventions for POS terminals.

iDempiere GardenWorld documentation (adempierebr.com/Garden_World, wiki.idempiere.org) confirms GardenWorld is a national retail and manufacturing enterprise with headquarters (HQ) organization with a warehouse and five stores.

iDempiere POS documentation mentions 'HQ Warehouse' as the warehouse location for POS configuration (WonderPOS_Developers_Guide-iDempiere). Warehouse is a mandatory field for POS Terminal configuration.

iDempiere Price List documentation (wiki.idempiere.org/en/Price_List) confirms 'Sales Price List' is a standard price list type. WalkingTree article on POS configuration lists Price List as mandatory field. 'Sale Price List' is consistent with naming conventions.

iDempiere POS Terminal configuration requires Cashbook field (WalkingTree article). 'HQ Cash' follows standard naming pattern for headquarters organization's cash book in GardenWorld demo data. Cashbook currency must match Price List currency.

iDempiere boolean fields use Y/N format (verified from GridField.java and database schema documentation on github.com/idempiere). 'N' means false/unchecked/disabled. This is the correct field format for storing 'Modify Price' as unchecked in the C_POS table.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses iDempiere 12 release (official Docker image) with GardenWorld sample database (real data from iDempiere's official distribution, not synthetic). The POS Terminal configuration requires fields: Name='Express Lane 1', Organization='HQ' (verified as headquarters in GardenWorld demo company), Warehouse='HQ Warehouse' (documented in POS configuration examples), PriceList='Sale Price List' (standard sales price list naming in iDempiere), CashBook='HQ Cash' (follows GardenWorld naming conventions), and IsModifyPrice='N' (verified as Y/N boolean format in iDempiere). All expected values match iDempiere's standard GardenWorld demo data structure and naming conventions.
